info.name: 001_MS CSSP APIS-UAT-PROD
info.description:
MS CSSP APIs exposed to State for the API integration. The  
service consumer Gainwell/State will use the element in  
the section of the SOAP header to provide the X.509 client  
certificate information. The HPTS uses this X.509 certificate to validate and  
authenticate the service consumer using the WS Security X.509 Certificate token  
profile.

body.raw:
<?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?>
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope" xmlns:a="http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing" xmlns:dsig="http://www.w3.org/2000/09/xmldsig#" xmlns:u="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd" xmlns:mime="http://www.w3.org/2005/05/xmlmime" xmlns:xenc="http://www.w3.org/2001/04/xmlenc#" xmlns:o="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-secext-1.0.xsd" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
    <soapenv:Header>
        <a:Action>CWPGetAccountInfo</a:Action>
        <a:MessageID>66730106-66a0-435a-85ba-adfc6ac88555/a:MessageID>
        <o:Security>
            <u:Timestamp>

            </u:Timestamp>

                <Issuer Format="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:1.1:nameid-format:X509SubjectName">CN=Sectigo RSA Organization Validation Secure Server CA,O=Sectigo Limited,L=Salford,ST=Greater Manchester,C=GB</Issuer>
                <dsig:Signature>
                    <dsig:SignedInfo>
                        <dsig:CanonicalizationMethod Algorithm="http://www.w3.org/2001/10/xml-exc-c14n#"/>
                        <dsig:SignatureMethod Algorithm="http://www.w3.org/2000/09/xmldsig#rsa-sha1"/>
                        <dsig:Reference URI="">
                            <dsig:Transforms>
                                <dsig:Transform Algorithm="http://www.w3.org/2001/10/xml-exc-c14n#"/>
                            </dsig:Transforms>
                            <dsig:DigestMethod Algorithm="http://www.w3.org/2000/09/xmldsig#sha1"/>

                            <dsig:X509SubjectName>CN=p2cwptest.msmeds.org,O=Conduent Business Services\, LLC,ST=New Jersey,C=US</dsig:X509SubjectName>
                            <dsig:X509Certificate></dsig:X509Certificate>

                <AttributeStatement>
                    <Attribute Name="urn:oasis:names:tc:xspa:1.0:subject:organization-id">
                        <AttributeValue>urn:oid:0DOM-001A-001A-0001</AttributeValue>
                    </Attribute>

    <soapenv:Body>

            <ns2:TXNHeader>

                <IPAddress>10.221.90.57</IPAddress>
                <TransactionID>66730106-66a0-435a-85ba-adfc6ac88555</TransactionID>
            </ns2:TXNHeader>
            <ns2:AcctHolderName/>
            <CWPAcctUserName>srinivaltus+10@gmail.com</CWPAcctUserName>
            <ns2:ProgramIdentificationInfo>
                <ProgramIdentificationCode>Medicaid</ProgramIdentificationCode>
                <ProgramCategoryDesc>Medicaid</ProgramCategoryDesc>
            </ns2:ProgramIdentificationInfo>

</soapenv:Envelope>
